description_long: This helmet is a dark, metallic headpiece with a menacing, fantasy-inspired design. It features two prominent, upward-curving horns on the top, giving it a demonic or beast-like appearance. The faceplate is angular and partially open, with jagged, fang-like protrusions along the lower edge, suggesting a stylized animal snout or jaw. The surface is mostly smooth but shows some visible wear, scratches, and riveted plates, adding to its rugged, battle-worn look. The helmet fully encloses the head, with side panels secured by visible bolts or rivets. There are no visible ventilation holes, logos, or graphic designs, and the overall color is a dark, almost black metallic shade.
description: A dark, horned metal helmet with a beast-like faceplate and jagged lower edge, featuring a rugged, battle-worn finish.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the smooth, rounded back of the helmet and the two large, upward-curving horns.
description_view_1: Back-side angle highlighting the curvature of the horns and the side panel with visible rivets.
description_view_2: Front-side view revealing the open, angular faceplate with jagged, fang-like edges and the prominent horns.
description_view_3: Frontal view emphasizing the aggressive, animalistic faceplate and the symmetrical placement of the horns.
